project: TESCAN 3DIM - Application of Novel Techniques for Representation and Reconstruction of Image Data
title: TESCAN 3DIM - Aplikace novych technik reprezentace a rekonstrukce 3D obrazovych dat

english_title.label: English title
english_title.text: TESCAN 3DIM - Application of Novel Techniques for Representation and Reconstruction of Image Data

keywords.label: Keywords
keywords.text: electron microscopy, CT, deep learning, ML, machine learning

abstract.label: Abstract
abstract.text: The goal of this collaboration is to connect the research and development capabilities of the TESCAN 3DIM team and the AI/ML researchers at FIT to explore and develop key technological directions in the area of microscopic and CT data processing.

team_members.label: Team members
team_members.text: Spanel Michal, doc. Ing., Ph.D. (DCGM) – research leader Cizmarik Roman, Ing. (DCGM) Krsicka Tomas, Ing. Kubik Tibor, Ing. (DCGM) Pukanec David, Ing. (DCGM) Silling Petr, Ing. (DCGM)
